title: Wasgij Destiny Age 14+ 28, Dad Cave - Unique 1000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzles for Adults, Colourful, Fun, Challenging & Brainteasing 1000 Pc Adults Jigsaw Puzzle - 100% Recycled Cardboard - Jumbo
features: UNIQUE JIGSAW PUZZLE CONCEPT: Engage in a fun brainteaser with the perfect addition to your jigsaw puzzle collection, where you don't puzzle what you see. Instead you must puzzle the future!
SWITCH IT UP: Enjoy a different take on puzzling where you don't puzzle what you see, but instead you must puzzle the future. Wasgij is perfect for puzzle enthusiasts, pros and novices alike.
CHALLENGING AND FUN: Wasgij tests your imagination and problem solving skills to make you think outside the box. The perfect gift for puzzle enthusiasts who want to take puzzling to the next level.
HIGH QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: The 1000pc jigsaw puzzle is made from sustainable and durable 100% recycled board. The precision die-cutting ensures every jigsaw piece maintains its original shape.
THE WONDER OF WASGIJ: Take on the challenge of Wasgij. Instead of following the image shown on the box, you must use your imagination and clues provided to work out the picture that you are puzzling.
description: Product Description Experience the excitement and challenge of Wasgij with the Destiny 28, Dad Cave 1000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzle! Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts, this brainteasing puzzle offers a unique twist on traditional jigsaws. Wasgij is an innovative puzzling concept that offers a fresh and engaging twist on classic jigsaw puzzles. Engage in a fun brainteaser with this distinctive addition to your jigsaw puzzle collection. Instead of puzzling the image on the box, you must envision and piece together the future scene! Enjoy a refreshing take on puzzling where you puzzle the future instead of what you see. Wasgij puzzles are perfect for both novice and experienced puzzle enthusiasts looking for a new challenge. Wasgij puzzles test your imagination and problem-solving skills, encouraging you to think outside the box. It's the perfect gift for anyone looking to elevate their puzzling experience. Made from 100% recycled cardboard, this 1000-piece jigsaw puzzle is both sustainable and durable. Precision die-cutting ensures that every piece fits perfectly and maintains its shape. Take on the Wasgij challenge! Instead of assembling the image shown on the box, use your imagination and the provided clues to figure out the picture you're puzzling. Ideal for Father's Day or for any puzzle enthusiast looking for a new challenge, this Wasgij puzzle is the perfect gift. Add the Wasgij Destiny 28, Dad Cave to your puzzle collection and enjoy hours of imaginative and brain-teasing fun! Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years
